title: rubus × inusitatus
intro: Rubus × inusitatus, also known as the Japanese hybrid raspberry, is a cross between the Japanese raspberry (Rubus parviflorus) and the European raspberry (Rubus idaeus). This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, making it a potential treatment for various health issues. The health benefits of Rubus × inusitatus include reducing inflammation, improving cardiovascular health, and supporting the immune system. The plant can be prepared in various herbal forms, such as teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
